name_en: Genuine leather, comes with picture packaging
name_cn:
Genuine leather, comes with picture packaging
【Premium Hardware Genuine Leather】Wander Matelasse Sheepskin Hobo Handbag/Shoulder Bag~20cm Begonia Pink Sheepskin
The Wander handbag has become a classic accessory. This mini bag is crafted from Matalasse sheepskin, featuring exquisite craftsmanship that creates a three-dimensional effect, showcasing refined elegance. Featuring a Hobo silhouette, it blends vintage charm with modern elegance, becoming a new symbol of modern femininity.
~Gold hardware
~Zipper closure
~Front metal engraved logo
~Cotton satin lining
Dimensions: W20×H17×D6cm
Code:_5BC125
